tagline: Merchant-controlled purchase notification styling for Ecwid stores.
shortDescription: Configure privacy-safe purchase notification styling from a native Ecwid merchant dashboard.
privacyContactBlurb: Contact the support channel listed in the live marketplace listing for privacy and data requests.
termsWarrantyBlurb: This app is provided as described in the active marketplace listing and any separate merchant agreement published with the app.

technicalNotes.hosting: Static HTTPS hosting via GitHub Pages
technicalNotes.storefrontBehavior: Merchant-configured purchase notification runtime that reads Ecwid public app config on the storefront
